stories.title: Anthropic Releases Claude Opus 4.8 with Enhanced Multimodal Reasoning 2
stories.summary: Anthropic has launched Claude Opus 4.8, featuring significant improvements in multimodal reasoning, code generation, and long-context understanding. The model demonstrates state-of-the-art performance on complex scientific and mathematical tasks while maintaining the safety standards Anthropic is known for.
stories.shareText: Anthropic just released Claude Opus 4.8 with major multimodal reasoning upgrades — state-of-the-art on complex science and math tasks. 🧠 #AI #Claude #Anthropic
stories.xPost: Anthropic just released Claude Opus 4.8 with major multimodal reasoning upgrades — state-of-the-art on complex science and math tasks. 🧠 #AI #Claude
stories.linkedinPost: Anthropic has released Claude Opus 4.8, featuring significant improvements in multimodal reasoning and long-context understanding. A major step forward for AI-assisted scientific research.

stories.title: OpenAI Previews GPT-5 Agentic Workflow Capabilities at Developer Day
stories.summary: OpenAI's annual Developer Day showcased GPT-5's native agentic workflow capabilities, including the ability to autonomously plan, execute multi-step tasks, and recover from errors without human intervention. The new function-calling API design dramatically reduces latency for tool-use-heavy applications.
stories.shareText: OpenAI previewed GPT-5's native agentic capabilities at Developer Day — autonomous multi-step task execution with built-in error recovery. The agent era is here. 🤖 #AI #OpenAI #GPT5

stories.title: DeepMind AlphaFold 3 Expands to Predict Full Protein Interaction Networks
stories.summary: Google DeepMind has extended AlphaFold 3 to model entire protein-protein interaction networks at the proteome scale, enabling researchers to map disease pathways and drug targets with unprecedented accuracy. Early results show a 40% improvement in predicting novel binding sites over previous methods.
stories.shareText: DeepMind extended AlphaFold 3 to map full protein interaction networks at proteome scale — 40% better at finding novel drug binding sites. AI is transforming medicine. 🧬 #AI #AlphaFold #DeepMind
